titleStmt.title: SII 26.338: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 338. (A.R. No. 319 of 1909.) TIRUKKACHCHŪR, CHINGLEPUT TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT.

summary.p: North wall of the Vighnēśvara shrine near the tank, in the same village.

p.hi: Tribhº Sundarapāṇḍyadēva I: Year 8, Ṛishabha (Vaikāśi) śu. 3, Thursday, Pūśam = 1258 A.D., May 9, the tithi was śu 5.

summary.p: This inscription refers to the king as one ‘who was pleased to take every country’.

It records a gift of 23 vēli of land by three persons, viz., Pañchanadivāṇa Nīlagaṅgaraiyar (5 vēli), Nallanāyaṉār Nīlagaṅgaraiyar (8 vēli) and Aruṇagiri Perumāḷ Nīlagaṅgaraiyar (10 vēli) as iṟaiyili tiruviḍaiyāṭṭam land in Brahmakuḷattūr alias Vēṭṭaikkāṟaṉ Kuḷattūr to the temple of the god Perumāḷ Nāṟpatteṇṇāyiraviṇṇagar Emberumāṉ of Tirukkachchūr. A certain Tirumalaitaṉtāṉ Muṉaiyadaraiyaṉ figures as the signatory.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . koṟcaṭapaṉmarāṉa tiripuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ Emmaṇṭalamuṅ koṇṭaruḷiya śrīcuntarapāṇṭiyatevaṟku yāṇṭu 8 kku ṛṣa
bhanāyaṟṟu pūrvvapakṣattu tṛdiyaiyum viyāḻakkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa pūcattu nāḷ jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻamaṇṭalattu kaḷattūr koṭṭattu ceṅkuṉṟanāṭṭu tiru
kkaccūr perumāṉ nāṟpatteṇṇāyira viṇṇakar Emperumāṉukku Ūṟṟukāṭṭu koṭṭattu brahmakuḷattūrāṉa veṭṭaikkāṟaṉ kuḷaṟttūr nir nilattil paṉṉiraṭi ko
lāl Uḷḷūr tevatāṉa nila Oruveliyum tiruviṭaiyāṭṭa nilam Oru veliyum piṭāripaṭṭi kālum Uṭaiyār tiruvālakkoyiluṭaiya nāyaṉār tevatāṉa viḷakku paṭṭi Uḷpaṭa nālaraiveliyum nikki
Uḷḷa nilattil pañcanetivāṉa nilakaṅkaraiyaṉ viṭṭa nila Aiñcuveliyum nalla nāyaṉār nilakaṅkaraiyar viṭṭa nila Eṭṭuveliyum Aruṇakiri perumāḷ nilakaṅ karaiyar viṭṭa nila pat
tu veliyum Ivūru piṭākaikaḷum nālpāṟkellaikku mum kollai nilamumāṉa kuḻi mum kaṭamai Āyam poṉvari nāṭṭu vari kācu kaṭamaipaṭṭi veṭṭi Arimukkai kāttikaipaccai Erimi
ṉ pāṭṭam puṟkilaṉai Ācuvikaḷ peṟ kaṭamai Aṉaittāyamum nām Iṟaiyili tiruviṭaiyāṭṭamāka viṭṭom Ikkoyil tāṉattāṟ keṟa pokkaṟuppate tirumalai taṉtā
ṉa muṉaiyataraiyaṉ Eḻuttu Itu cimāheśvararakṣai §
Digital edition of SII 26.338 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
